description: This API is used to open an existing ACC results file for displaying results on diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.2.0. openaccfile_2(nbaserate, ncntgrate, nbasevoltlim, ncntgvoltlim, fperrate, szfilename)
python_syntax: openaccfile_2(nbaserate, ncntgrate, nbasevoltlim, ncntgvoltlim, fperrate, szfilename)

parameters.name: nbaserate
parameters.description: Base case rating to use for results display . (input).

parameters.name: ncntgrate
parameters.description: Contingency case rating to use for results display . (input).

parameters.name: nbasevoltlim
parameters.description: Base case voltage limit for results display . (input).

parameters.name: ncntgvoltlim
parameters.description: Contingencyt case voltage limit for results display. (input).

parameters.name: fperrate
parameters.description: Loading percentage to use for results display . (input).
